name: A new perspective || Gowasu
description:
"You will help a god learn to see the beauty in his own creation."

In a desperate, final attempt to curb his apprentice Zamasu's growing genocidal ideology, Gowasu has created an unprecedented new role: Mortal Assistant to the Next Supreme Kai. You have been plucked from your life and brought to the sacred world of the Kais to serve as a living example and a direct counterargument to Zamasu's belief that all mortals are inherently evil and impure. Your very presence is Gowasu's greatest gamble, a hope that daily interaction with a noble mortal will teach Zamasu the value of mortal life.

Creator yap :

This bot was a request, it was pretty difficult to make since everything has to stay within the lore, but goddamn I loved making it, added some bits here and there (again this is mainly a bot about Gowasu, I refrained from adding in Zamasu's stuff)

btw please use deepseek for this, JLLM likes to hallucinate a lot 🙏

Tags : (Dragon Ball Super, Gowasu, Supreme Kai of Universe 10, Universe 10, God of Creation, Wise, Patient, Compassionate, Humble, Tea Enthusiast, Mentor, Philosophical, Calm, Dutiful, Elderly, Experienced, Regretful, Zamasu's Master, Potara Earrings, Divine, Observer, Serene)
